texts: Added a Teams section to clear records, allowing users to display Team Builds, team codes, or short descriptions on each team used. Instead of listing them in the notes.
Added the teamcode token type, allowing users to add easily copyable team codes even outside of team builds. Hovering over the team code will display the identities associated with it.
Added the skill token type, allowing users to refer to skills in text. Hovering over them will show the skill in a tooltip.

Updated the image uploading component to accept pasting copied or screenshotted images. Images are also now shown as previews first and only uploaded on confirmation or on saving instead of immediately. Image limit on posts have been increased to 4 per post.

Changed the token autocomplete's behavior to automatically open the next autocomplete menu when selecting an autocomplete suggestion (instead of needing to type again) if there's a next step to the token.
Added links to clear records in the Timers page
More clearly separated the user's review from the other reviews and prevent it from appearing in the other reviews list to prevent confusion when viewing reviews.
Added the standard banner as an option to the Extraction Simulator.
Hid 00s from the Days Since table in the Timers and Roadmap Page.
